entries.gt_0182aa2de161df: The black hand's bread is warm, but the palm is hard to wash after.
entries.gt_01def225b7c072: Press the wound first. We will bandage pride later.
entries.gt_02410e35675fbc: In the Meat Lower, a killed monster rarely means the fight is over.
entries.gt_02813e7b808dd2: The safe key is by the safe again.
entries.gt_04013f478392dd: Do not touch your face. The air is bad.
entries.gt_059d746831491d: The protocol smells of iodine, and iodine is not listed as spent. I certify this is worse than an error.
entries.gt_0602bb80554dcd: There are someone else's tools and notes in these cabinets. No key, do not climb in.
entries.gt_06ad35ec3b16fc: A hungry person bargains first, then chews filler and no longer argues.
entries.gt_06c00867525fef: The siren recently moved through the pipes. You cannot go far from the hermodoor now.
entries.gt_070e48dab9c1e8: Food will end before patience, and they do not issue patience as rations here.
entries.gt_071b96cf6e65b8: After all-clear they do not knock nicely. After all-clear they wait until you are written down.
entries.gt_07e6eb443a531d: Say the surname quietly, the secretary is writing.
entries.gt_08b0a6a29b903f: If you bring filtered water, I will tell you who is selling places by the hermodoor.
entries.gt_0923c78192761b: While the zone is ours, the doors sound calmer, almost human.
entries.gt_093fe3316b28e2: The flask is warm without a burner.
entries.gt_0a5166672786e6: The Ministry lift makes official mistakes: then it will ask for another stamp.
entries.gt_0a9b53e41298e6: The residential shaft recently spun the route. Check who came out in the wrong section.
entries.gt_0b21df0363cba5: Production is silent. Means either the raw material left or the crate is jammed.
entries.gt_0b8271041f23aa: The tap coughed rusty and went quiet.
entries.gt_0c8eb441aa2c3d: They help quietly so the refusal sounds louder.
entries.gt_0d7ccf8a45f1c4: Divide the ration by the radiator, not by the window.
entries.gt_0ea14312a294fd: Eat while it is warm, and return the spoon before the next norm.
entries.gt_108d143513a192: Do not pour salt in front of everyone.
entries.gt_10e854a6e68b34: The Collectors lift brings not a floor, but pressure in the ears.
entries.gt_11d74db5881d93: Bread first, talk later. Even the house committee would decree it that way.
entries.gt_11d94293608b45: Samples under the table, people after them!
entries.gt_121b30980b77b5: I have a coupon for kasha, but no kitchen. That is not hunger anymore, it is mockery.
entries.gt_12bb97165d3e72: The main thing is not to open when they call in a voice that is not theirs.
entries.gt_13d16b899c5497: Better speak short here, walk fast, and do not correct the map.
entries.gt_1495ff82f29907: The energy cell is hot, not from work. If they count it as a cartridge, the burn will answer first.
entries.gt_15c9efc013952d: Rake to the new guy, logbook to the sergeant, bucket to the orderly. That is how order holds.
entries.gt_160ac7e4182b2b: Do not touch the queue with someone else's hands: even not all of ours are clean here.
entries.gt_1641b130bc7e61: The bleeding got worse. Need a bandage and a place by the table.
entries.gt_1678f7cb9e9f59: Words are going around about you. For now, words are enough for me.
entries.gt_16ee6d423642cd: When the shop stands still, prices do not.
entries.gt_16ff2c27168834: The filter is intact, the leg is not!
entries.gt_175d1ad1eefffc: If you are scared, count candles in a whisper!
entries.gt_1beb2340b07341: The machine has the sleeve. Hands away before startup.
entries.gt_1c185adc003a46: My stomach is growling so loud people turn around.
entries.gt_1c310d6f804dfa: The bottle is empty, but warm.
entries.gt_1c89f1ee16a3e9: With a ration in your pocket, walk straight. Runners after theft get counted faster.
entries.gt_1d4a9f3fd3a5ac: Do not touch the charge squeal with a bare hand. Then the hand twitches for a week.
entries.gt_1f81beb2059dad: The foreman said not to go near the sleeve without gloves. Then they wrote off the gloves along with the hand.
entries.gt_1fa7ebf437f49b: The light filter turned green after the sample. Cover the device and call a technician.
entries.gt_1fefbaa3865af5: I do not like that sound.
entries.gt_216d3cff89d892: In the Apartments after a fight like that, neighbors count doors, not casings.
entries.gt_2173c3966637c9: The cutter is dull, the metal is angry.
entries.gt_22047ab802cb24: Do not put out the candle, it is quieter for me that way.
entries.gt_22114de3f3fb0f: The icon is sweating. Do not touch.
entries.gt_22689443c5fd59: The orderly does not go last!
entries.gt_2322c7976f52b1: Fine, you can be trusted for one question longer.
entries.gt_24b2fba16bdfa8: You can leave a bucket by the radiator here. Not for long, and only if they know you.
entries.gt_252acd99c4b48a: A citizen exists while coupon, room, and signature match.
entries.gt_253ead7d261e17: Before someone else's box, ask the owner or get ready for a scandal.
entries.gt_25842fc8dd89de: The box is jingling. Not your sound.
entries.gt_261580043d2b84: Filter got wet - count the sortie closed.
entries.gt_2732191680102d: Not every open safe was opened for you.
entries.gt_2792a9f4bb070e: Soon there will be more wounded than bandages.
entries.gt_28c69a9d484503: The rake bent again. Means the new guy is alive or the slime is strong.
entries.gt_28ec85bb8e9aa5: If only I can reach the medpost; there the logbook can argue.
entries.gt_2910f68420aee3: Do not open to a familiar voice!
entries.gt_295faaae17fc69: A chalk mark is only good if there is an arrow back nearby.
entries.gt_2a71136188e620: First a pack disappears, then a place by the hermodoor. I have seen this already.
entries.gt_2b971267ed272f: Boxes always have an owner, even if the owner is silent.
entries.gt_2c60fad8b1c9e6: Take the food, do not touch me!
entries.gt_2dbf984c25d030: Matches are wet. That kind of day.
entries.gt_2df227f7d8e022: In your own section you do not touch someone else's bucket. Even if your mouth is very dry.
entries.gt_2e099f4921b140: The lift by the Meat Lower only makes mistakes toward worse.
entries.gt_2e1508621c5a8e: If you help again, I will tell you where the storekeeper hides the dry coupons.
entries.gt_2fd30e0c37fa16: Bucket by the door. Means the queue soon.
entries.gt_2fdeab7bb1e6d8: After samosbor, the protocol smells of iodine and there is less water in the bucket.
entries.gt_30e46186d46980: The storekeeper matters exactly until the first empty shelf.
entries.gt_310dcb8174c51a: Where the machine produced goods, someone else's hands will be there soon.
entries.gt_3143a523a28152: Quality control sniffs the batch first. That is why their faces are so calm.
entries.gt_324cf2e34086e0: In the Ministry, even a dead beast will be filed retroactively.
entries.gt_32980d7fae63c8: The hermodoor clicked before the siren. Bad.
entries.gt_32df2c75404957: The hinge is wet. Door will warp soon.
entries.gt_349dd9e1b180a3: The exchange is short: food, water, passage, silence.
entries.gt_3575a7bc8a163f: On a wet floor, a trace is more honest than a map.
entries.gt_361208b99ceece: The data is ambiguous. That means bad.
entries.gt_379a4cc517b4dd: Right now I would drink even rusty kompot if the nurse allowed it.
entries.gt_38c940b9465684: The line lacks metal. The foreman asks that this be written as a temporary delay.
entries.gt_395f3acf1eb53e: A gear without a pair is more dangerous than a monster: at least a monster does not demand an act.
entries.gt_39b5940d4646fc: A dry radiator after wet fog means: a pocket of heat was nearby, not rest.
entries.gt_3a2fff0612afd6: A traveler without water is a local corpse on deferral.
entries.gt_3a30faf34a3424: There is a new dent on the cabinet from inside. The instrument man pretends it was there.
entries.gt_3a313ab98bc775: It punched through. I move worse.
entries.gt_00b4905a56a702: Closed jar and a tight bag barely smell: keep supplies sealed, throw bait away from the route, and burn or shoot through the narrow exit.
entries.gt_01886ad981e696: raw organics, concrete crumbs by the paws, rare piece of meat
entries.gt_01a869f974a51a: Corridors, smoking rooms, offices, and common rooms of civilian floors, Hell, and the Void.
entries.gt_03528cfd161ee0: wet rags, filter layer, yellow sediment from a service tray
entries.gt_036d1dedd563ae: A straight line is dangerous, especially in water; after a volley there is a short window to move in.
entries.gt_03a89ef4494af7: Apartments, false safe blocks, and dense communal pockets of the Living Zone and Apartments.
entries.gt_03d9e1a48de19c: burned-out filament, glass, ozone smell, rare fuse
entries.gt_04a47277ad0ad8: Industrial long-range automaton that tests straight lines and the pause after a volley.
entries.gt_04aa908284fc37: PSI predator of the water line that punishes a long retreat along one wet route.
entries.gt_04d08cfedbb2f3: Death by Feral Deadman should read as a fight in a doorway crowd or a late shot after its charge.
entries.gt_04e3bb70cc3b6d: Long-range line-of-sight enemy that breaks open corridor shooting.
entries.gt_05c6562a6b9942: A long fight increases pressure; winning requires heavy damage at once or giving up the room.
entries.gt_06265a38883022: Make noise or show yourself, then step off the straight line: Slepoglaz shoots where you were. After the green beam it reloads for a long time and is weak up close.
entries.gt_06a6e74eb7108b: The choral count gives a limited wave of offspring; clearing the children opens a short damage window before the next verse.
entries.gt_073f1ad6062013: Pale web on floor and wall, low many-legged body, green fang tips, and scraps of harness.
entries.gt_08bdd818a12cb5: When the host collapses it detaches, crawls briefly toward a corpse or stunned NPC, and tries to take a new body; UV delays the transfer.
entries.gt_09b07d0ee4d91b: Fragile crack-sprinter that turns a quiet corridor into a short timing test.
entries.gt_0a06bfa110d078: torn order, sealing-wax dust, scraps of a moving order
entries.gt_0b2ecef4307120: Immobile PSI turret that punishes medium range.
entries.gt_0bdfa165d3c444: Ripple moves against the current, a cloudy eye opens a green slit under the black film.
entries.gt_0d0d8dbf314cbd: Plasma charges, the wet passage hums, the chassis freezes before firing.
entries.gt_0d4e9fc357d7fe: Corridors, offices, production, and late open rooms from the Ministry to the Void.
entries.gt_0e10213f3fde09: If line of sight is not broken before the flash, a bolt comes; after the volley there is a closing window.
entries.gt_0ee1b6e1b6b4a9: Ripples run from the dark reflection to the player, the pressure gauge presses without a needle, water hums in the head.
entries.gt_0f9311a1657788: A needle shadow stands with its back turned, elbows pointing into the corridor, its step back too eager.
entries.gt_108eda22b0465c: dirty slime, filter layer, marked sample near the feeding site
entries.gt_10f2be86944475: A cold draft moves against the door, a skull-face appears from the wrong side of the wall.
entries.gt_114d57dd7e0abb: psychic residue, PSI dust, rare antidepressant from a victim's pocket
entries.gt_117389e0ed9d02: Does not attack first: talks, accepts food/medicine or an NII container, but after a hit runs and cuts with claws only in a tight corner.
entries.gt_11a325bfd322c4: Paper rustles from the player's pocket.
entries.gt_11a9010350b797: Death by Shadow should explain the dark corner, lack of light, or stepping into point blank instead of backing off.
entries.gt_11ff38ac74831d: Long-range bureaucratic shooter where cover matters more than arguing with text.
entries.gt_1389d66f40ee41: Death by Mukhozhuk should read as trust in a sick superior, late quarantine, or fighting near his guards and rations.
entries.gt_13f1879e649db5: Death by Idol should point to open medium range instead of a corner, door, or point blank.
entries.gt_148c463efd1ae4: Sleeps in trance, wakes from proximity, noise, or damage, grows from chains of hits and kills; slime or a hermodoor breaks the chase.
entries.gt_14a2615871a4a2: Storage debris-lurker that pretends to be straight iron by the walls.
entries.gt_15116180446c7f: Sleeps in storage trash, wakes from a close step, loud metal, or a shot; the first lunge is strong, then the body is fragile.
entries.gt_1541fcfb2e9386: Production rooms, warehouses, bunkers, and sealed shelters of the Living Zone, Collectors, and Hell.
entries.gt_157910bf73fc21: In water and active slime it speeds up and grabs harder; on dry lit concrete it dries, loses tempo, and leaves a short toxic film.
entries.gt_15e0d27cefb0f6: Rare neutral mutant woman: tests restraint, aid, and the choice between sample, denunciation, and violence.
entries.gt_166661292a7c58: Show a short local log when documentHunter chooses a target because of documents.
entries.gt_16b48da77d7547: Heavy collector worm: meat distracts, pipe makes the bite decisive.
entries.gt_16e962663f33ef: Fast weak ammo drain and wide-passage check.
entries.gt_170d6a39e20ddb: One Deadman reads clearly, but among people and doors it grabs before you can finish it comfortably.
entries.gt_1738a5195f7c6d: False post-samosbor sweep that first looks like late cleanup.
entries.gt_17405dc4d3538e: Death by Bonecutter should point to standing in the windup without three steps, a corner, buckshot, or armor plate.
entries.gt_1790a068976634: Dangerous at the end of the windup; three steps, a corner, column, buckshot, or armor plate breaks the killing tempo.
entries.gt_17d31c2fa5c838: Flooded corridors, production, warehouses, and bathrooms of the Collectors.
entries.gt_17d9c45f23efde: Check jambs before loot, close the door behind you, and cross thresholds backing out: a direct look or closed opening breaks the first lunge.
entries.gt_17debe6a2145b5: Apartments, offices, pantries, false safe blocks, and fungal domestic rooms.
entries.gt_18c03b78a381b5: Elite windup melee fighter that must be read before the lunge.
entries.gt_1905de1ab7595f: Death by Head Slug should read as an unfinished parasite, fighting near bodies, or trying to save the host without quarantine.
entries.gt_1a98b64b5efb64: Draw it to the room center: by walls and seams Shovnik is faster and hits harder; without an edge it loses tempo.
entries.gt_1aeef9b28c08a0: Dark ambush monster that checks light, movement, and a wide retreat.
entries.gt_1b55e1b776cbf6: Crackle of wire, tiny footfalls, and several silhouettes before contact.
entries.gt_1bb143841d6acb: Do not chase the first silhouette: stand still, keep a lit exit behind you, or reveal the real body with a flashlight before the second hit.
entries.gt_1ca8bc0bd88d1c: Do not grab the neat stack of iron by the rack right away: poke or shoot from range, keep two cells, and finish it after the first lunge.
entries.gt_1d98dfa485e419: Production, command, corridor, and office zones of the Ministry and Collectors.
entries.gt_1d9eda87e960e6: Deep dark ambusher that punishes chasing the first silhouette with a second body.
entries.gt_1e2e42bdf804d8: Change position before contact: doors and walls do not hold a spirit; distance and UV-broken tempo help.
entries.gt_1f03a80f659ea8: Count the refrain: kill the source before it releases offspring, clear the children for a short damage window, or leave before the offspring cap blocks the route.
entries.gt_1f10d603920fe6: Black human absence with a gray ash edge reaches toward the nearest light.
entries.gt_1f2dac94b8d964: Read the raised corner before looting: bypass the threshold, burn the carpet from range, keep salt or a filter, and do not fight in doorways during the spore exhale.
entries.gt_1ff1fc2ba48ba0: Medium close threat that forces distance from the concrete edge.
entries.gt_20f6396a1e8dc8: Offices, command rooms, corridors, and common rooms of the Ministry and the Void.
entries.gt_21485865f8422f: White seam smells of rubber, the wall clicks, a silhouette slides along the panel.
entries.gt_21834c4d5a2049: Death by Robot should point to a wet straight line or entering before the pause after plasma.
entries.gt_22b490dca6a51a: Gets precise lock and higher damage if the target stands in a lit cell or tight to a lamp; darkness and cover break the shot.
entries.gt_22c3d1603b57e1: gray wet trace, cold dust, rare filter layer
entries.gt_235e73de2d7c88: By walls, racks, and machines it leaves cover faster; in the center it reads clearer and can be shot down.
entries.gt_244664d9bb301a: empty note, cold draft, rare PSI dust
entries.gt_256a20ea0a4e4f: fake pass, foreign key without scratches, rare Unperson detector
entries.gt_2596e0bf7339d3: Stationary light-line shooter that makes a lamp both safety and risk.
entries.gt_27f6b5b3f04402: Death by Creator should read as empty supplies, standing in green light, or dashing without an exit.
entries.gt_286ad6a7d85281: wet PSI residue, metallic-tasting water, rare PSI dust from a drain-face
entries.gt_28beeae10c1ce6: Slime rooms of the Living Zone, Collectors, and lost fungal/samosbor blocks.
entries.gt_28c155be615607: Death by Fog Shark should read as standing in fog, leaving the pack late, or lighting fire near a gas belly.
entries.gt_29447e3581bf56: Death by Chervie should read as fighting near a working screen, obeying a false order, or ignoring a source that can be switched off.
entries.gt_29a9c1b12143f3: charred tag, chalk with a number, black hook from a tool bag
entries.gt_2a3db8d77ea3a3: Link sighted/log text with wallBias so the player sees the reason to keep the room center.
entries.gt_2a8c66fe1e01aa: Ministry archives, machine rooms of the Collectors, NET wells, and void screen nodes.
entries.gt_2ae150685a67a4: Death by Nightmare should point to a drawn-out fight without an exit or without heavy damage.
entries.gt_2ae958f93728c4: The second silhouette lags one step behind the real body.
entries.gt_2b4eb3fb7aadc8: wire, storage trash, rare duct tape from a cracked node
entries.gt_2c0175b7297f41: Death by Gnilushka should read as attacking first, chasing into a dead end, or trying to finish a wounded mutant woman in close quarters.
entries.gt_2e0e58d891dd4c: Rare host parasite: breaks the usual body, quarantine, and finishing check.
entries.gt_2ef3e84443f2ef: Rare route trap: a false cabin instead of a normal transition.
entries.gt_2faf52ecc70597: Death by Betonnik should explain that the player stayed in a straight corridor without a corner, noise, or fire.
entries.gt_2fd4af72061956: Slow armored melee elite that forbids weak trades.
entries.gt_30fee3cb7061b3: Barely moves: holds the route with its body, sap, and seed cloud. Chopping clears the path more quietly, fire kills fast but makes smoke.
entries.gt_31a643e4cdce03: Acidic ink, rustle without paper, a stamp licking the air near the pocket.
entries.gt_31aafb1b29287c: Black figure fused with a desk, yellow sheets stretch into a line, a red stamp gathers a false face.
entries.gt_31f495d7b503a3: The wording rustles without paper, a line straightens for 15 cells.
entries.gt_333142957b752f: Death by Lamp-Eye should read as standing under a lamp on a straight line without a dark corner or cover.
entries.gt_33cd9bdada6256: Death by Mancobus should explain the straight sector, living guards, or no cover between volleys.
entries.gt_340698e33b0fce: Apartment aberration that keeps to its own room and turns neighbors' noise into growing wall organics.
entries.gt_3533ea9e10cd1a: Archives, card files, registries, and commission halls of the Ministry.
entries.gt_3567c98fc941ff: Service corridors, fungal biotopes, borshchevik growers' storerooms, and abandoned wet rooms of the Living Zone and Collectors.
entries.gt_35baa6e52992ed: Senses targets with documents from farther away; a container, dumping excess papers, and corners shorten the pursuit.
entries.gt_363c07d6d5bb0e: Procedural routes, dark metro/service floors, and lift anomalies after samosbor.
